user.title: Configure YT-DLP Downloader
user.description: Add a YouTube playlist to download automatically.

data_description.playlist_url: Full URL of a public YouTube playlist (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=…)
data_description.download_path: Absolute path where files will be saved (e.g. /media/music)
data_description.replace_existing: When disabled (default) already-downloaded files are skipped
data_description.auto_update: Recommended — keeps yt-dlp current so YouTube changes don't break downloads

error.invalid_url: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://
Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://

download_now.name: Download Playlist Now
download_now.description: Trigger an immediate download for one or all configured playlists.

config_entry_id.name: Integration Entry
config_entry_id.description: Which playlist to download. Leave empty to download all.

update_ytdlp.name: Update yt-dlp
update_ytdlp.description: Update yt-dlp to the latest version via pip.
